creator: wgodfrey@ena.com
text:
Ok, after coming in this morning I carefully checked the PERC controller
versions in the two Dells, the one that can book 8.0-RC2 is a PERC 5/I,
the one that cannot is a PERC 6/i.  Is there any known issues with
PERC6/I controllers?

Thanks!

Subject: Re: amd64/140067: [boot] 8.0-RC2 from ISO, after install, hangs
on boot right before loader
